chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANO Constt. Petition No. D- 615 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection as flag "A". 3. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025. Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, Advocate, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh --------------- At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the Petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits, if, learned trail court is directed to dispose of the very case within three months. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, DPG for the State raised no objection to this proposal. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed with directions to the learned trial court/Sessions Judge, Larkana, to expedite the case and dispose of within three months. J U D G E J U D G E S.Ashfaq
